hero.title: Your AI-Powered Fitness Coach
hero.subtitle: Personalized workouts, smart meal plans, and an AI coach you can chat with to adjust your plan in plain language — like texting a trainer, not fighting menus.

features.title: Everything You Need in One App

items.title: AI Coaching
items.description: Chat with your AI coach to adjust meals or training and get practical updates fast — like texting a real trainer.

items.title: Meal Planning & Macros
items.description: Build meal plans that match your goals and lifestyle. Log and refine meals with smart macro tracking.

items.title: Workout & Training
items.description: Structure your lifting, cardio, and weekly routine. Programs designed for your fitness level.

items.title: Food Scanner
items.description: Snap your food for quicker logging and smarter nutrition choices throughout the day.

items.title: Exercise Library
items.description: Explore a large library of exercises with clear guidance for home or gym sessions.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.description: See trends in your workouts, meals, and weight so you stay accountable and motivated.

items.title: Beginners
items.description: Get a clear plan without guesswork.

items.title: Gym Goers
items.description: Organized lifting and nutrition in one app.

items.title: Busy People
items.description: Faster meal planning and simple adjustments.

whyPrimeCoach.title: Why Users Choose Prime Coach
whyPrimeCoach.description: Stop switching between five apps for workouts, meals, and random AI tips. Prime Coach connects training and nutrition so your week feels coherent — and your coach understands what you actually want to change.

download.title: Build a Plan You Can Stick To
download.subtitle: Download Prime Coach and get your personalized plan in minutes — then refine it anytime with your AI coach.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Your all-in-one fitness and nutrition app — personalized workouts, smart meal plans, and an AI coach that adapts to you.
